expectations.text: 輸出包含「主訴」區塊，且保留右側太陽穴、月經週期等描述
expectations.evidence: File contains '## 主訴' section with right temple, menstrual cycle details preserved

expectations.text: 輸出包含「診斷」區塊，提及肝血不足和肝陽上亢
expectations.evidence: File contains '## 診斷' with both 肝血不足 and 肝陽上亢

expectations.text: 處方區塊保留所有藥名和劑量（天麻15g、鉤藤12g等）
expectations.evidence: Table contains 天麻 15 g, 鉤藤 12 g, 石決明 30 g with 後下/先煎 notes

expectations.text: 輸出包含「追蹤重點」區塊
expectations.evidence: File contains '## 追蹤重點' with 5 follow-up items

expectations.text: 輸出包含「疑問思考」區塊
expectations.evidence: File contains '## 疑問思考' with 4 clinical reflection questions

expectations.text: 最後有詢問使用者是否需要補充或調整的句子
expectations.evidence: Ends with '這樣的整理有沒有需要補充或調整的地方？'
